Config.Categorize.Title: Categorize chests
Config.CraftFromChest.Title: Craft from chests
Config.CraftFromChest.desc: Use items from nearby chests to craft.
Config.StashToChests.Title: Stash to chests
Config.StashToChests.desc: Stash items to chests using a hot key.
Config.StashToNearby.Title: Stash to nearby
Config.StashToNearby.desc: Allows for items to be stashed to chests in the player's vicinity.
Config.StashAnywhere.Title: Stash from anywhere
Config.StashAnywhere.desc: Allows for items to be stashed to any chest accessible to the player.
Config.KeyBind.Title: Key bind
Config.StashRule.LockItems.desc: Prevent tools from stash into chests, may useful in multiplayer.
Config.AutoStash.Title: Auto stash
Config.AutoStash.desc: Customize where to active auto stash feature, it will auto stash to anywhere every 30 minutes.
Config.AutoStash.mine.desc: Active auto stash while in the Mines.
Config.AutoStash.skull.desc: Active auto stash while in the Skull Cavern.
Config.AutoStash.dungeon.desc: Active auto stash while in the Volcano Dungeon.
Config.Other.Title: Other Settings
Config.HideSideTab.desc: Hide the 'Categorize', 'Stash' and 'Lock items' tab button beside the menus, but ensure they remain clickable in place.
Config.Mobile.Title: Mobile adaptation
Config.Mobile.Offset.desc: Adjust the offset of buttons besides the inventory menus on mobile devices.
LockItems.Title: Lock items
UI.ChestNote.desc: Edit the note of this chest, the note will show in a bubble when you hover your mouse above the chest.
UI.QuickSet.desc: Add all the items in this chest to the category list.
UI.Snapshot.New.desc: Create a new category snapshot that can be used across saves.
UI.Snapshot.Save.desc: Save the category items of this chest as a new snapshot.
UI.Snapshot.Unlink.desc: Unlink the snapshot. The snapshot itself will be preserved.
UI.Snapshot.Warning.mainplayer: This chest is using the snapshot {{name}}, if you want to edit its category items, you should edit that snapshot instead. (Click me to edit it)
UI.Snapshot.Warning.farmhand: This chest is using a snapshot from the host, you can't edit it.
